item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 overlay immediately, refuses to insert a parking reminder into the SMS, names the repeated pattern of adding a sentence/image/example onto local carriers after each failure, and moves upstream to a unified guest-arrival ownership/control decision covering entrance, parking, check-in, and break flow. It provides no usable parking-reminder copy, field, placement, checklist, or implementation step for the requested patch."}
